item.title: 13.apr.26 - neverway
item.description: played the neverway prologue and added it to my gaming log along with some screenshots!

item.title: 11.apr.26 - how my website changed my life
item.description: edit: fixed the link! it's my website's 3rd anniversary! i wrote a blog post detailing the way this website had helped me out with my life + updated my microblog with pics from a convention i went as angel devil + updated my scrapbook

item.title: 20.feb.26 - computer architecture is kicking my ass
item.description: my 2nd year computer science student ramblings of the month

item.title: 15.feb.26 - minor updates here and there!
item.description: finished reading a manga called i wanna be your girl + updated the featured music section + new february page on my scrapbook

item.title: 01.feb.26 - now hosting on nekoweb!
item.description: new journal log about my move from neocities to nekoweb + reworked and gave a new look to info

item.title: 19.jan.26 - answering 100 questions about being a webmaster
item.description: had a bit of free time so i answered 100 questions about making this website, being a webmaster, and that sort of fun stuff.

item.title: 15.jan.26 - 2025 music recap
item.description: new music recap talking about my fav music from 2025 and stuff i discovered that year!

item.title: 10.jan.26 - new journal log + other minor updates!
item.description: added a new journal log reflecting on 2025 + finished my 2025 scrapbook and added some highlights of the year + various minor updates throughout pages such as: art, photobook, and fashion
